input_placeholder: Enter task... Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line
extra_prompt_placeholder: Extra instructions, e.g. coding standards, test requirements...
about_text:
Gangge Code v0.1.0

AI Coding Assistant — 5-Layer Agentic Loop

Session Persistence · File Diff · Test Verification · Batch Tasks · Plan Confirmation
plan_info: Review the plan. Once confirmed, the LLM will execute accordingly. You can edit the text above to adjust.
rollback_select:
Select a checkpoint to rollback to:
(This is irreversible, uncommitted changes will be lost)
rollback_confirm_msg:
Will rollback to {hash}. Uncommitted changes will be lost.

Are you sure?
preview_click: Click a file on the left to preview
execution_done: ✅ Done ({rounds} rounds, {tools} tool calls, Tokens: input={input}, output={output}{cost})
plan_mode_prompt:
## Current Mode: Plan First, Execute Later
Please output a clear execution plan with steps, files involved, and risks.
Format:

### Execution Plan
1. ...
2. ...

### Files Involved
- ...

### Risk Assessment
- ...

After outputting the plan, wait for user confirmation. Do not execute automatically.
memory_decisions_title:
# Decision Log

Record key technical decisions to prevent repeated mistakes.

(No decisions recorded yet)
attach_too_large_msg: Attachment size {size} KB exceeds 20MB limit, please choose a smaller file
git_save_prompt: Commit message (e.g. feat: add XX, fix: fix XX, save: daily save):
git_save_summary: ✅ Local save complete — commit {hash} — {files} files, {insertions} insertions, {deletions} deletions
git_save_uptodate: ✅ Already up to date. Last commit: {hash} — {msg}
git_remote_prompt:
Enter GitHub repo URL
(e.g. https://github.com/user/repo.git or git@github.com:user/repo.git):
status_git_pushed_first: ✅ First push success! Upstream branch set ({branch})
git_init_msg:
This project doesn't have a Git repo yet.

Initialize automatically?
(Will run git init + initial commit)
git_init_done: 🔧 Git repo initialized with first commit
git_autocommit_msg:
There are {n} uncommitted file changes.

You need to commit before pushing. Auto-commit now?
(Choose 'No' to push only existing commits)
git_push_skip_commit: ⏩ Skipped commit, pushing existing commits only
git_push_no_remote: ❌ No remote configured. Click 'Push' to set up GitHub URL
git_remote_existing_hint: Enter the GitHub repo URL. If you haven't created one yet, click below to open GitHub in your browser.
git_remote_open_browser: 🌐 Open GitHub to create a new repo
git_remote_create_hint: Fill in the details below to automatically create a repo on GitHub and bind it.
git_remote_no_token:
A GitHub Token is required to auto-create repositories.

Please go to Settings → GitHub Config and enter your Personal Access Token.

Or switch to the 'Existing Repo' tab to enter a URL manually.
settings_github_token_hint:
Personal Access Token (needs 'repo' scope). Used to create GitHub repos automatically.
Generate: GitHub → Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens → Generate new token
